summary: Database Backup Management feature fully tested. All backend endpoints (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Fixed a bug where 'json' module was not imported in server.py causing preview endpoint to fail.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ GET /api/database/status returns correct DB info (name, size, collections count)
✓ POST /api/database/backup creates selective backup with async polling
✓ Frontend tabs (Usuarios/Base de Datos) working correctly
✓ Database status cards show DB name, size, last backup date
✓ Collections table shows name, count, size for all 31 collections
✓ Selective backup dialog shows checkboxes with record counts
✓ Preview dialog shows backup info and collection details
✓ Restore/Delete buttons only visible for admin role
seed_data_creation: Multiple selective backups created during testing (users + importaciones collections)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Database Backup Management feature fully tested. Route: /dashboard/usuarios -> 'Base de Datos' tab. Endpoints: GET /api/database/status, GET /api/database/backups, POST /api/database/backup, GET /api/database/backup/{id}/status, GET /api/database/backup/{id}/download, GET /api/database/backup/{id}/preview, DELETE /api/database/backup/{id}, POST /api/database/restore/{id}. Backup files stored in /app/backend/static/backups/. Selective backup with small collections (users, importaciones) completes in ~2 seconds. DO NOT test full backup as DB is 359 MB and will timeout.

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing 'import json' at top of file causing preview_backup endpoint to fail with 'json is not defined' error
preview_backup endpoint returning MongoDB ObjectId which is not JSON serializable
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed 'sample' field from preview response to avoid ObjectId serialization issues

backend_endpoints.GET /api/database/status: ✓ Returns DB name, total size (359.28 MB), collections count (31), last backup info
backend_endpoints.GET /api/database/backups: ✓ Returns list of backups with id, filename, fecha, tipo, size_mb, colecciones_count, creado_por
backend_endpoints.POST /api/database/backup: ✓ Creates backup asynchronously, returns backup_id for polling
backend_endpoints.GET /api/database/backup/{id}/download: ✓ Returns ZIP file with backup data
backend_endpoints.GET /api/database/backup/{id}/preview: ✓ Returns backup_info and colecciones list with counts
backend_endpoints.DELETE /api/database/backup/{id}: ✓ Deletes backup file and history entry (admin only)

frontend_ui.tabs_navigation: ✓ Usuarios and Base de Datos tabs working
frontend_ui.database_status_cards: ✓ Shows DB name, total size, last backup date
frontend_ui.collections_table: ✓ Shows all 31 collections with name, count, size
frontend_ui.action_buttons: ✓ Backup Completo, Backup Selectivo, Actualizar buttons working
frontend_ui.selective_backup_dialog: ✓ Shows checkboxes for collections with record counts
frontend_ui.backup_progress: ✓ Shows progress bar and current collection during backup
frontend_ui.backup_history_table: ✓ Shows fecha, tipo, tamaño, colecciones, creado_por, acciones
frontend_ui.preview_dialog: ✓ Shows backup info and collections summary
frontend_ui.admin_only_buttons: ✓ Restore and Delete buttons only visible for admin role

permissions_tested.admin_access: ✓ Full access to all database management features
permissions_tested.coordinator_access: ✓ Can view status, create backups, download, preview (cannot delete/restore)
